# MdS Websites

> Founder-led digital growth agency in Cambridge, UK, helping ambitious SMEs grow through branding, web design and local SEO. Strategy-first, results-focused, with 12+ years of design experience and 30+ years of business know-how.

MdS Websites is run by founder Martin Spooner. Every project is handled directly by the strategist who designs and builds it — no hand-offs, no juniors. The agency serves Cambridge and the East of England, with clients across the UK.

## Services

- [Branding & Identity Design](https://mdswebsites.co.uk/services-branding): Brand strategy, logo design, visual identity and brand guidelines.
- [Web Design & Development](https://mdswebsites.co.uk/services-web-design): Conversion-led, WordPress websites built to win enquiries.
- [Digital Marketing & SEO](https://mdswebsites.co.uk/services-digital-marketing): Local SEO, technical SEO, content marketing and conversion optimisation.

## Key pages

- [About](https://mdswebsites.co.uk/about): The studio's story, approach and founder background.
- [Our Process](https://mdswebsites.co.uk/process): How projects are scoped, designed and delivered.
- [Portfolio](https://mdswebsites.co.uk/portfolio): Case studies of websites and brands built for clients.
- [Industries](https://mdswebsites.co.uk/industries): Sectors served, including professional services, hospitality and trades.
- [Insights](https://mdswebsites.co.uk/insights): Practical articles on branding, websites, SEO and winning local customers.
- [Contact](https://mdswebsites.co.uk/contact): Get in touch or book a free review.
